name: oraclex-mail-engine
description: ORACLEX Mail Engine — Cloudflare Workers email delivery service

scripts.db:seed: wrangler d1 execute oraclex-db --command="INSERT OR IGNORE INTO developers (name, api_key, status) VALUES ('ORACLEX Test', 'oraclex_live_test_key_xyz123', 'active')"
scripts.db:seed:remote: wrangler d1 execute oraclex-db --remote --command="INSERT OR IGNORE INTO developers (name, api_key, status) VALUES ('ORACLEX Test', 'oraclex_live_test_key_xyz123', 'active')"
